---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Lucas Melfi"
date: "2026-05-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.


```{r}
install.packages("esquisse")
install.packages("plotly")
library (esquisse)
library(plotly)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(janitor)
library(scales)
library(forcats)


```


```{r}
g_export <- falkland_islands_market_share_on_global_trade_1
str(g_export)
atos$variable <- as.numeric(datos$variable)
g_export2 <- g_export %>% clean_names()
g_export2 <- g_export2 %>%
  mutate(across(c(ends_with("_exports"), ends_with("_share")), as.numeric))
str(g_export2)



```

```{r}
top5 <- g_export2 %>%
  slice_max(country_exports, n = 5) %>%
  arrange(desc(country_exports))
```

```{r}
ggplot(top5) +
  aes(x = fct_reorder(hs4, country_exports, .desc = TRUE), y = country_exports) +
  geom_col(fill = "#112446") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(scale = 1e-6, suffix = " M")) +
  theme_minimal()

```
```{r}
ggplot(top5) +
  aes(x = fct_reorder(hs4, country_exports, .desc = TRUE), y = country_exports) +
  geom_col(fill = "#112446") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(scale = 1e-6, suffix = " M")) + 
  labs(
    title = "Top 5 exportaciones",
    x = "Producto (HS4)",
    y = "Exportaciones (millones USD)"
  ) +  
  theme_minimal()

```
```{r}
ggplot(top5) +
  aes(x = fct_reorder(hs4, country_exports, .desc = TRUE), y = country_exports) +
  geom_col(fill = "#112446") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(scale = 1e-6, suffix = " M")) + 
  labs(
    title = "Top 5 exportaciones",
    x = "Producto (HS4)",
    y = "Exportaciones (millones USD)")+
    geom_text(aes(label = round(country_exports/1e6, 1)), 
            vjust = -0.3) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

```

```{r}
ggplot(top5) +
  aes(x = fct_reorder(hs4, country_exports, .desc = TRUE), y = country_exports) +
  geom_col(fill = "#112446") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(scale = 1e-6, suffix = " M")) + 
  labs(
    title = "Top 5 exportaciones",
    x = "Producto (HS4)",
    y = "Exportaciones (millones USD)")+ 
  geom_text(aes(label = label_number(scale = 1e-6, suffix = " M")(country_exports)), 
            vjust = -0.3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(scale = 1e-6, suffix = " M")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```
```{r}
ggplot(top5) +
  aes(x = fct_reorder(hs4, country_exports, .desc = TRUE), 
      y = country_exports) +
  geom_col(fill = "#112446") +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = scales::label_number(scale = 1e-6, suffix = " M")(country_exports)),
    vjust = 1.5,
    color = "white"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(scale = 1e-6, suffix = " M")) +
  labs(
    title = "Top 5 exportaciones",
    x = "Producto (HS4)",
    y = "Exportaciones (millones USD)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```
```{r}
ggplot(top5) +
  aes(x = fct_reorder(hs4, country_exports, .desc = TRUE), 
      y = country_exports) +
  geom_col(fill = "#112446") +
  geom_text(
    aes(
      label = scales::label_number(scale = 1e-6, suffix = " M")(country_exports),
      vjust = ifelse(country_exports > max(country_exports)*0.6, 1.5, -0.3),
      color = ifelse(country_exports > max(country_exports)*0.6, "white", "black")
    )
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(scale = 1e-6, suffix = " M")) +
  labs(
    title = "Top 5 exportaciones Islas Malvinas 2023",
    x = "Producto (HS4)",
    y = "Exportaciones (millones USD)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
  axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
  legend.position = "none",
  plot.title = element_text(
    size = 16,
    face = "bold",
    hjust = 0.5, 
    color = "grey40"
  )
)
```
```{r}
rm(g_export)
```
